!TestDataFrameQueryBacktickQuoting
class)
scopec
        Yields a dataframe with strings that may or may not need escaping
        by backticks. The last two columns cannot be escaped by backticks
        and should raise a ValueError.
        r
C  C
D_D D
A (x)z
B(x)z
